action: In the open Chrome tab, type 'flying beast' in the YouTube search bar and subscribe to the channel with that name.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task is to type 'flying beast' in the YouTube search bar in the open Chrome tab. To proceed, I need to bring the Chrome window to the foreground and check if YouTube is open. Since the instruction says 'in the open Chrome tab', I will click on the Chrome icon to ensure it is active.
